aboutSection.title: About Me
aboutSection.description: I'm a sushi chef with experience in Europe's finest restaurants, passionate about Japanese cuisine and modern culinary technology. Now sharing practical knowledge and professional expertise.

gallery.title: Kitchen Atmosphere
gallery.description: Authentic moments from the kitchen where tradition meets technology.

chefToolsSection.title: Kitchen Reference
chefToolsSection.description: Practical tools for anyone who wants to cook correctly — unit converter, fish season calendar, ingredient nutrition guide.
chefToolsSection.converterDesc: Convert grams, ounces, liters and kitchen units instantly.
chefToolsSection.popularDesc: 1 cup of flour in grams and other popular cooking conversions.
chefToolsSection.scaleDesc: Scale recipe ingredients to any number of portions.
chefToolsSection.nutritionDesc: Calories, protein, fat and carbs — with localized names and photos.
chefToolsSection.suggestionsDesc: Gram table for cup, tablespoon and teaspoon of various products.
chefToolsSection.ingredientsDesc: Nutrition, vitamins, and minerals for hundreds of ingredients.
chefToolsSection.fishSeasonDesc: Check when fish and seafood are freshest.
chefToolsSection.labDesc: AI creates a recipe from your ingredients with steps and nutrition.
chefToolsSection.flavorPairingDesc: Discover the best flavor combinations between ingredients.
